title: DT5 1PP, Powerfuel Portland Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/AP3304SZ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:   Operator name: Powerfuel Portland Limited Installation name: Portland Energy Recovery Facility Permit number: EPR/AP3304SZ/A001  "
